title: Australia's central bank backs tokenization as pilot finds $16.7B upside
message_html: Australia's central bank backs tokenization as pilot finds $16.7B upside ...
snippet: Tokenized finance and related infrastructure upgrades will be “revolutionary,” said Reserve Bank of Australia Assistant Governor Brad Jones.

title: Morning Minute: Circle Plunges 20% Over Clarity Act Yield Changes
message_html: Morning Minute: Circle Plunges 20% Over Clarity Act Yield Changes ...
snippet: Circle just had its worst day ever, while the CFTC is building a task force for crypto, AI, and prediction markets.
